# Third-party code

`content/injected/wwebjs-utils.js` is a browser-wrapper conversion of
`src/util/Injected/Utils.js` from `wwebjs/whatsapp-web.js`.

- License: Apache-2.0
- Pinned revision: `2dc9466facb027caee19dbf285e0a2763f5373bb`
- License text: `WHATSAPP_WEB_JS_LICENSE.txt`
- Update command: `npm run sync:wwebjs`

Run the update command, review the generated diff, and test all supported media
types against the current WhatsApp Web before publishing the extension.
